name: Supabase
description: Postgres database, auth, edge functions, and storage management via the Supabase MCP server

fields.label: Supabase Access Token
fields.description: Personal access token from Supabase dashboard (Account → Access Tokens)

fields.label: Project Reference
fields.description: Project ID from Supabase project settings. Scopes the server to a single project.

readOnly.description: Restrict to read-only SQL queries and disable mutating tools

features.description: Comma-separated feature groups to enable (account, database, debugging, development, docs, functions, branching, storage)
